title: provider-gitea plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the provider-gitea semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_DRAFT.description: Create the release as a draft.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PRERELEASE.description: Mark the release as a prerelease.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_BODY.description: Optional release body override. Falls back to SEMREL_CHANGELOG.

SEMREL_TAG_NAME.description: Release tag name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_CHANGELOG.description: Generated release notes or changelog content from semrel core.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.

SEMREL_IS_PRERELEASE.description: Core-provided prerelease flag used when SEMREL_PLUGIN_PRERELEASE is unset.
